name: ch32v203xxx_golden
description: CH32V203C8T6 golden test suite — SysTick, IWDG, RTC, Flash, CRC, ADC, DMA, GPIO, UART, SPI, I2C, TIM, EXTI, CAN, PVD, BKP, OPM, SPI-DMA, USB-CDC (USART-HD skipped: needs PA2↔PB10 wire not in bench)

wiring_guide.stage0: WCHLink only (SWDIO→PA13, SWDCLK→PA14, GND, 3V3) + USB-C power. No GPIO jumpers.
stage1: PB6(SCL1) + PB7(SDA1) + 4.7kΩ to 3V3  (I2C — optional, skip if no pull-ups)
stage2: Note: stage2 replaces stage1 PA7↔PA6 and PA8→PA0 wires
stage3: PA2↔PA3 Stage-1 jumper stays in place (PA3 acts as IPU pull-up for USART2 half-duplex self-loopback on PA2)  — no new wire needed
USB-C cable from board secondary USB port (PA11=D-/PA12=D+) to host  (USB CDC banner — needs 96MHz PLL)

notes: WCHLink fw 2.18 (PID 8010) required. fw 2.01 and PID 8012 do NOT work with this OpenOCD.
